message.content:
@startuml
participant "main" as main
participant "bkup.BackupFacade" as bkup
participant "srcrepo.SourceRepository" as srcrepo
participant "dstrepo.DestinationRepository" as dstrepo
participant "metarepo.MetadataRepository" as metarepo
participant "scanner.AllFileScanner" as scanner
participant "FileSystem" as FileSystem
participant "SQLite3" as SQLite3

main -> bkup : execute()

bkup --> Get all files : Get all files

Get all files --> scanner.AllFileScanner : get_all_files()
scanner.AllFileScanner --> FileSystem : read
FileSystem --> scanner.AllFileScanner : write
scanner.AllFileScanner --> FileSystem : read
FileSystem --> scanner.AllFileScanner : write
scanner.AllFileScanner --> bkup : all_files

bkup --> Get source files : Get source files

Get source files --> srcrepo.SourceRepository : get_files_matching_criteria(all_files)
srcrepo.SourceRepository --> bkup : src_files

bkup --> Cleanup of metadata corresponding to already deleted files : Cleanup of metadata corresponding to already deleted files

Cleanup of metadata corresponding to already deleted files --> metarepo.MetadataRepository : get_uncontained_keys(src_files)
metarepo.MetadataRepository --> SQLite3 : SELECT
SQLite3 --> metarepo.MetadataRepository : result
metarepo.MetadataRepository --> bkup : uncontained_keys
metarepo.MetadataRepository --> srcrepo.SourceRepository : remove_metadatas(uncontained_keys)

loop [until the generator finishes]
    metarepo.MetadataRepository --> dstrepo.DestinationRepository : DELETE
    dstrepo.DestinationRepository --> metarepo.MetadataRepository : yield removed_metadata <return value is discarded>
    metarepo.MetadataRepository --> bkup : yield removed_metadata <return value is discarded>

bkup --> Create backup and update metadata : Create backup and update metadata

Create backup and update metadata --> _get_backup_list(src_files) : _get_backup_list(src_files)
_create_backup_list(src_files) --> bkup : backup_list
bkup --> dstrepo.DestinationRepository : create_backups(backup_list)
dstrepo.DestinationRepository --> bkup : yield backed_up_src_file
bkup --> metarepo.MetadataRepository : update_metadata(backed_up_src_file)
metarepo.MetadataRepository --> dstrepo.DestinationRepository : REPLACE INTO
dstrepo.DestinationRepository --> metarepo.MetadataRepository : REPLACE INTO

bkup --> Discard old backups : Discard old backups

Discard old backups --> srcrepo.SourceRepository : get_discard_list(today, all_files)
srcrepo.SourceRepository --> bkup : discard_list
bkup --> dstrepo.DestinationRepository : remove_backups(discard_list)
dstrepo.DestinationRepository --> bkup : yield removed_file <return value is discarded>
bkup --> metarepo.MetadataRepository : update_metadata(backed_up_src_file)
metarepo.MetadataRepository --> dstrepo.DestinationRepository : REPLACE INTO
dstrepo.DestinationRepository --> bkup : yield removed_file <return value is discarded>

main --> bkup : return
@enduml
